case_title: ASHLEY FILUTZE VS. SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL ARTISTRY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FILUTZE, ASHLEY AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL ARTISTRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILUTZE, ASHLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL ARTISTRY $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,175.00, PLAINTIFF HAS PROVED THAT DEFENDANT'S HYGIENIST DAMAGED 8 VENEERS. DEFENDANT SHALL REPLACE THE VENEERS WITHIN 90 DAYS OF THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. IF DEFENDANT ELECTS NOT TO REPLACE THE VENEERS, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $10,000 TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF SC-150 FORM USED FOR RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILUTZE, ASHLEY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100) SERVED NOV-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL ARTISTRY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL ARTISTRY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF ASHLEY FILUTZE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL ARTISTRY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-19-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO DENTAL ARTISTRY
